meta.strategy: Buy a curated 'forever' subset of the watchlist (durable leaders + core ETFs), equal weight, and just hold — no signals, no timing. Shown four ways: $5,000 lump sum and $250/mo dollar-cost averaging, each with and without a yearly rebalance, vs the same money in the S&P 500.
meta.note: Common start = when the newest holding (XOM) began trading. The basket holds VOO, so it overlaps the benchmark by design. Rebalancing is modeled cost- and tax-free.
